name: Harici Posta Kutusu Yönlendirme Kuralı
description: Harici Posta Kutusu Yönlendirme Kuralı tespit kuralı. m365_audit kaynağında tetiklenir.
sigma_rule:
title: Harici Posta Kutusu Yonlendirme Kurali
logsource:
  product: m365_audit
  service: exchange
detection:
  selection:
    Operation: New-InboxRule
  filter_forward:
    Parameters|contains: ForwardTo
  filter_external:
    Parameters|contains|not: anadolufinans.example.tr
  condition: selection and filter_forward and filter_external
author: SOC Team

name: İmkansız Seyahat Tespiti
description: İmkansız Seyahat Tespiti tespit kuralı. idp_auth kaynağında tetiklenir.
sigma_rule:
title: Imkansiz Seyahat Tespiti
logsource:
  product: idp_auth
  service: azure_ad
detection:
  selection:
    Operation: UserLoggedIn
  timeframe: 60m
  geo_distance:
    src_geo|distinct > 1000
  condition: selection | count(distinct(src_geo)) by user > 1
author: SOC Team

name: MFA Push Bombardımanı
description: MFA Push Bombardımanı tespit kuralı. idp_auth kaynağında tetiklenir.
sigma_rule:
title: MFA Push Bombardimani
logsource:
  product: idp_auth
  service: azure_ad
detection:
  selection:
    Operation: MFA_Denied
  timeframe: 10m
  threshold: count > 5
  condition: selection | count by user > 5
author: SOC Team

name: Parola Püskürtme Tespiti
description: Parola Püskürtme Tespiti tespit kuralı. idp_auth kaynağında tetiklenir.
sigma_rule:
title: Parola Spray Saldirisi
logsource:
  product: idp_auth
  service: azure_ad
detection:
  selection:
    Operation: UserLoginFailed
  timeframe: 10m
  distinct_users:
    UserPrincipalName|count|gt: 10
  same_src:
    src_ip|count|lt: 3
  condition: selection | count(distinct(user)) > 10 and count(distinct(src_ip)) < 3
author: SOC Team

name: Riskli OAuth Uygulama İzni
description: Riskli OAuth Uygulama İzni tespit kuralı. idp_auth kaynağında tetiklenir.
sigma_rule:
title: Riskli OAuth Uygulamasi
logsource:
  product: m365_audit
  service: azure_ad
detection:
  selection:
    Operation: AddOAuth2PermissionGrant
  filter_publisher:
    Publisher|exists: false
  high_perms:
    Scope|contains: ['Mail.Read', 'Mail.Send', 'Files.ReadWrite.All']
  condition: selection and filter_publisher and high_perms
author: SOC Team

name: Office Makro Çalıştırma Zinciri
description: Office Makro Çalıştırma Zinciri tespit kuralı. edr_telemetry kaynağında tetiklenir.
sigma_rule:
title: Makro Calistirma Tespiti
logsource:
  product: endpoint_edr
  service: sysmon
detection:
  selection:
    EventID: 7
  office_parent:
    ParentImage|endswith: ['WINWORD.EXE', 'EXCEL.EXE']
  script_child:
    Image|endswith: ['cmd.exe', 'powershell.exe', 'wscript.exe']
  condition: selection and office_parent and script_child
author: SOC Team

name: C2 Beacon İletişimi
description: C2 Beacon İletişimi tespit kuralı. edr_telemetry kaynağında tetiklenir.
sigma_rule:
title: C2 Beacon Iletisimi
logsource:
  product: endpoint_edr
  service: sysmon
detection:
  selection:
    EventID: 3
  filter_external:
    DestinationIp|startswith|not: ['10.', '192.168.']
  beacon_interval:
    connection_interval|lt: 300
  timeframe: 2h
  condition: selection and filter_external | stats count, avg_interval by src_ip, dst_ip
author: SOC Team

name: Toplu Dış Paylaşım
description: Toplu Dış Paylaşım tespit kuralı. m365_audit kaynağında tetiklenir.
sigma_rule:
title: Toplu Dosya Paylasimi
logsource:
  product: m365_audit
  service: sharepoint
detection:
  selection:
    Operation: FileSharedExternally
  timeframe: 15m
  threshold:
    count > 10
  condition: selection | count by user > 10
author: SOC Team

name: Anormal Uzun DNS Query Tespiti
description: Anormal Uzun DNS Query Tespiti tespit kuralı. dns_logs kaynağında tetiklenir.
sigma_rule:
title: DNS Tunelleme Suphesi
logsource:
  product: endpoint_edr
  service: sysmon
detection:
  selection:
    EventID: 22
  txt_records:
    QueryType: TXT
  long_queries:
    QueryName|len|gt: 52
  timeframe: 1h
  condition: selection and (txt_records or long_queries) | count by src_ip > 50
author: SOC Team

name: Kerberos TGS Request Spike
description: Kerberos TGS Request Spike tespit kuralı. idp_auth kaynağında tetiklenir.
sigma_rule:
title: Kerberoasting Saldirisi
logsource:
  product: endpoint_edr
  service: sysmon
detection:
  selection:
    EventID: 4769
  ticket_type:
    TicketEncryptionType: 0x17
  non_machine_account:
    ServiceName|contains|not: '$'
  condition: selection and ticket_type and non_machine_account
author: SOC Team

name: IIS Dizininde Şüpheli .aspx Dosyası
description: IIS Dizininde Şüpheli .aspx Dosyası tespit kuralı. ids_signature kaynağında tetiklenir.
sigma_rule:
title: Web Shell IIS Tespiti
logsource:
  product: endpoint_edr
  service: sysmon
detection:
  selection:
    EventID: 1
  iis_parent:
    ParentImage|endswith: w3wp.exe
  shell_child:
    Image|endswith: ['cmd.exe', 'powershell.exe']
  condition: selection and iis_parent and shell_child
author: SOC Team

name: LSASS Process Memory Erişimi
description: LSASS Process Memory Erişimi tespit kuralı. edr_telemetry kaynağında tetiklenir.
sigma_rule:
title: LSASS Process Erisimi
logsource:
  product: endpoint_edr
  service: sysmon
detection:
  selection:
    EventID: 10
  target_lsass:
    TargetImage|endswith: lsass.exe
  source_untrusted:
    SourceImage|contains|not: ['svchost.exe', 'csrss.exe', 'wininit.exe', 'winlogon.exe']
  condition: selection and target_lsass and source_untrusted
author: SOC Team

name: Admin Share Üzerinden Binary Transfer
description: Admin Share Üzerinden Binary Transfer tespit kuralı. edr_telemetry kaynağında tetiklenir.
sigma_rule:
title: SMB Lateral Movement
logsource:
  product: endpoint_edr
  service: sysmon
detection:
  selection:
    EventID: 3
  smb_port:
    DestinationPort: 445
  admin_share:
    DestinationShare|contains: ['ADMIN$', 'C$', 'IPC$']
  timeframe: 5m
  condition: selection and smb_port and admin_share | count by src_ip > 3
author: SOC Team

name: Anormal Veri Çıkış Hacmi
description: Anormal Veri Çıkış Hacmi tespit kuralı. dlp_engine kaynağında tetiklenir.
sigma_rule:
title: Anormal Veri Cikisi
logsource:
  product: web_proxy
  service: proxy
detection:
  selection:
    HttpMethod: POST
  large_upload:
    ResponseBytes|gt: 52428800
  external_host:
    Url|contains|not: ['anadolufinans.example.tr', 'office.com']
  condition: selection and large_upload and external_host
author: SOC Team

name: DGA Pattern DNS Query
description: DGA Pattern DNS Query tespit kuralı. dns_logs kaynağında tetiklenir.
sigma_rule:
title: DGA Domain Tespiti
logsource:
  product: endpoint_edr
  service: sysmon
detection:
  selection:
    EventID: 22
  nxdomain_count:
    QueryStatus: NXDOMAIN
  timeframe: 10m
  condition: selection | count by src_ip > 20 and unique(domain) > 15
author: SOC Team

name: Antivirüs Servisi Durdurma Girişimi
description: Antivirüs Servisi Durdurma Girişimi tespit kuralı. edr_telemetry kaynağında tetiklenir.
sigma_rule:
title: Antivirus Devre Disi Birakma
logsource:
  product: endpoint_edr
  service: sysmon
detection:
  selection:
    EventID: 1
  disable_commands:
    CommandLine|contains: ['Set-MpPreference', 'DisableRealtimeMonitoring', 'net stop', 'sc stop']
  condition: selection and disable_commands
author: SOC Team

name: Toplu Dosya Uzantısı Değişimi
description: Toplu Dosya Uzantısı Değişimi tespit kuralı. edr_telemetry kaynağında tetiklenir.
sigma_rule:
title: Fidye Yazilimi Dosya Uzantisi
logsource:
  product: endpoint_edr
  service: sysmon
detection:
  selection:
    EventID: 11
  ransom_ext:
    TargetFilename|endswith: ['.encrypted', '.lock', '.crypt', '.wncry', '.onion']
  timeframe: 5m
  condition: selection and ransom_ext | count > 20
author: SOC Team

name: Şüpheli Zamanlanmış Görev
description: Şüpheli Zamanlanmış Görev tespit kuralı. edr_telemetry kaynağında tetiklenir.
sigma_rule:
title: Supheli Zamanlanmis Gorev
logsource:
  product: endpoint_edr
  service: sysmon
detection:
  selection:
    EventID: 1
  schtask_cmd:
    CommandLine|contains: ['schtasks', '/create']
  hidden_flag:
    CommandLine|contains: ['/sc onstart', '/tn', '/ru system']
  condition: selection and schtask_cmd and hidden_flag
author: SOC Team

name: WMI Kalıcılığı
description: WMI Kalıcılığı tespit kuralı. edr_telemetry kaynağında tetiklenir.
sigma_rule:
title: WMI Kalicilik Mekanizmasi
logsource:
  product: endpoint_edr
  service: sysmon
detection:
  selection:
    EventID: 19
  wmi_filter:
    EventFilter|contains: ['__InstanceCreationEvent', '__EventFilter']
  consumer_binding:
    Consumer|contains: ['CommandLineEventConsumer', 'ActiveScriptEventConsumer']
  condition: selection and wmi_filter and consumer_binding
author: SOC Team

name: Kripto Mining Aktivitesi
description: Kripto Mining Aktivitesi tespit kuralı. edr_telemetry kaynağında tetiklenir.
sigma_rule:
title: Kripto Mining Tespiti
logsource:
  product: endpoint_edr
  service: sysmon
detection:
  selection:
    EventID: 3
  mining_ports:
    DestinationPort: [3333, 4444, 5555, 8080, 14444]
  mining_pools:
    DestinationIp|contains|not: ['10.', '192.168.', '172.16.']
  high_cpu:
    cpu_percent > 80
  condition: selection and mining_ports and mining_pools
author: SOC Team

name: Şüpheli Paket İndirme
description: Şüpheli Paket İndirme tespit kuralı. proxy kaynağında tetiklenir.
sigma_rule:
title: Tedarik Zinciri Suphesi
logsource:
  product: endpoint_edr
  service: sysmon
detection:
  selection:
    EventID: 1
  signed_binary:
    SignatureStatus: Valid
  rare_publisher:
    Publisher|frequency|lt: 5
  condition: selection and signed_binary and rare_publisher
author: SOC Team

name: Standart Olmayan Port Kullanımı
description: Standart Olmayan Port Kullanımı tespit kuralı. firewall kaynağında tetiklenir.
sigma_rule:
title: Alternatif Port Iletisimi
logsource:
  product: endpoint_edr
  service: sysmon
detection:
  selection:
    EventID: 3
  alt_ports:
    DestinationPort|contains: [53, 80, 443]
    Protocol: tcp
  alt_service:
    Image|contains|not: ['chrome.exe', 'firefox.exe', 'msedge.exe']
  condition: selection and alt_ports and alt_service
author: SOC Team

name: Dosya Uzantısı Aldatmacası
description: Dosya Uzantısı Aldatmacası tespit kuralı. email_gateway kaynağında tetiklenir.
sigma_rule:
title: Dosya Uzantisi Sahtekarligi
logsource:
  product: email_gateway
  service: mimecast
detection:
  selection:
    Direction: Inbound
  double_ext:
    AttachmentName|re: '.*\..{3,4}\..{3,4}'
  exec_ext:
    AttachmentName|endswith: ['.exe', '.scr', '.vbs', '.js', '.hta', '.ps1']
  condition: selection and (double_ext or exec_ext)
author: SOC Team

name: Session Token Replay
description: Session Token Replay tespit kuralı. idp_auth kaynağında tetiklenir.
sigma_rule:
title: Oturum Tekrari Suphesi
logsource:
  product: idp_auth
  service: azure_ad
detection:
  selection:
    Operation: UserLoggedIn
  same_token:
    SessionId|count > 2
  different_ip:
    src_ip|distinct > 1
  timeframe: 5m
  condition: selection | count by SessionId > 2 and distinct(src_ip) > 1
author: SOC Team

name: Base64 PowerShell Komutu
description: Base64 PowerShell Komutu tespit kuralı. edr_telemetry kaynağında tetiklenir.
sigma_rule:
title: Encoded PowerShell Komutu
logsource:
  product: endpoint_edr
  service: powershell
detection:
  selection:
    EventID: 4104
  encoded_flag:
    ScriptBlockText|contains: ['-EncodedCommand', '-enc ', 'FromBase64String']
  suspicious_decode:
    ScriptBlockText|contains: ['Invoke-Expression', 'IEX', 'Invoke-Command']
  condition: selection and encoded_flag or suspicious_decode
author: SOC Team

name: Public Cloud Storage Yanlış Yapılandırma
description: Public Cloud Storage Yanlış Yapılandırma tespit kuralı. cloud_audit kaynağında tetiklenir.
sigma_rule:
title: Cloud Yanlis Yapilandirma
logsource:
  product: m365_audit
  service: azure_ad
detection:
  selection:
    Operation: Set-AdminAuditLogConfig
  risky_change:
    Parameters|contains: ['-UnifiedAuditLogIngestionEnabled', '$false']
  condition: selection and risky_change
author: SOC Team

name: Anormal Sertifika İsteği
description: Anormal Sertifika İsteği tespit kuralı. cert_authority kaynağında tetiklenir.
sigma_rule:
title: Sertifika Anomalisi
logsource:
  product: endpoint_edr
  service: sysmon
detection:
  selection:
    EventID: 1
  new_cert:
    Image|endswith: certutil.exe
  decode_flag:
    CommandLine|contains: ['-decode', '-urlcache', '-split']
  condition: selection and new_cert and decode_flag
author: SOC Team

name: VPN Brute Force
description: VPN Brute Force tespit kuralı. vpn_logs kaynağında tetiklenir.
sigma_rule:
title: VPN Brute Force
logsource:
  product: idp_auth
  service: vpn
detection:
  selection:
    Operation: VPN_LoginFailed
  timeframe: 5m
  threshold:
    count > 30
  geo_spread:
    src_geo|distinct > 1
  condition: selection | count by src_ip > 30 and distinct(src_geo) > 1
author: SOC Team
